subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket and dark trousers, stepping off the curb to cross the rain-wet boulevard directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small satchel, wears rain-spotted shoes; the red jacket bright and reflected on the wet pavement below
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket, dark trousers, rain-spotted shoes, small satchel
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.facial_features: Round face, light brown hair, small features, rosy cheeks

subjects.description: Parked cars glistening along the curbs of the after-rain boulevard, wet roofs mirroring the brightening sky
subjects.appearance_details: Compact European sedans and hatchbacks in muted colors, rain beads and sky reflections gleaming on their wet panels
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A tree-lined residential boulevard in a European town at midday, just after rain, with clouds breaking to bright patches. Elegant terraced houses with wrought-iron balconies line a two-lane road of fresh, rain-wet asphalt that mirrors the brightening sky. Fresh spring-green plane trees arch over the road, dripping after the shower; parked cars sit glistening along the curbs. Wide sidewalks run beside the homes. Bright breaking sunlight glints off the wet pavement and its crisp center markings.

lighting.conditions: Bright midday with clouds breaking after rain
lighting.direction: Brightening high sun through scattered clouds, with fresh sky reflected on the wet road
lighting.shadows: Returning soft-edged midday shadows over a glistening wet surface
lighting.illumination_effect: Bright, freshly-washed light with sparkling wet reflections; the child's red jacket glows and reflects on the rain-wet asphalt

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Fresh spring greens, rain-washed pastel facades, glistening wet grey asphalt mirroring bright sky, and a vivid red accent from the child's jacket reflected below
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Fresh, sparkling after-rain boulevard calm heightened by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating plane trees and balconies, glistening parked cars, sky reflections on the wet road

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the wet road and crossing child, with bright reflections on the pavement

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the rain-washed European residential boulevard as clouds break.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the wet asphalt, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the fresh wet asphalt, partially faded, its edges gleaming with reflected sky after the rain
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the after-rain boulevard, dripping plane trees and glistening parked cars along the wet asphalt as sun breaks through.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed over wet asphalt
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking, tires hissing on the wet surface as it decelerates.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips, wet-road sheen
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely on the glistening road.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a European residential boulevard just after rain, breaking sun glinting off the wet asphalt beneath dripping plane trees and glistening parked cars. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking on the wet road, slowing with a slight forward pitch. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Fresh after-rain boulevard sounds of dripping trees and birdsong returning, a faint hiss of tires on wet asphalt, the hum of the vehicle, then wet firm brake and tire friction as it decelerates, settling into a bright idle with dripping and birdsong.
